response.step_by_step_log: 1. Monitored the entire video for audio content. 2. Identified instrumental background music and streamer commentary. 3. Confirmed no vocal music exists in the video. 4. Consequently, no song metadata or lyrics were searched for or resolved.
response.global_summary: This video features gameplay of a Minecraft-like game, focusing on farming activities and inventory management. The audio consists entirely of the streamer's commentary and instrumental background music; no vocal music is present.

scenes.description: Streamer plays a Minecraft-style game, performing farming tasks, managing inventory, and checking chests, accompanied by continuous instrumental background music and commentary.
